name: agent-sdlc
description: Reusable issue intake, worker dispatch, review, documentation, and merge-ready software development lifecycle workflows.

interface.longDescription: Agent SDLC helps Codex run repeatable software development workflows across GitHub Issues, branches, pull requests, and communicating threads. It can turn rough requests into scoped issues with saved worker dispatch prompts and CI tiers, launch implementation workers from ready issues, run an implementer and independent reviewer loop, and use a dedicated docs role to keep repository documentation aligned with implementation changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent SDLC to intake issues, dispatch workers, and run structured implementer/reviewer workflows.
